data.biography:
Jermaine's acting career started by accident when he took a friend to a local extra casting call. At first, Jermaine was not interested in the casting call, but a producer persuaded him to try out. After a few more extras casting calls and attending an acting workshop, the acting bug bit him.

He contacted Shari Rhodes, a local New Mexico and Texas casting director, for personal coaching in acting. Instead, she encouraged him to audition for a supporting role in the movie Urban Justice starring Steven Segal and Eddie Griffin. He was booked for the role, since then he has been on various movies and television series. He has had the privilege to work in such movies as Felon, Ring of Death, In Plain Sight, Terminator Salvation, Gamer, The Book of Eli, and Thor.

Jermaine continues to pursue an acting career with enthusiasm as well as opportunities to work in stunts.
data.name: Jermaine Washington

山下诚一郎（1992年5月21日-）是日本男性声优。

大泽事务所所属。广岛县出身。毕业于娱乐传媒综合学院声优艺人专业。

高中毕业后，进入娱乐传媒综合学院。2012年凭借外国电影《Good Doctor-禁断的病历簿》作为声优出道，之后于2013年1月至3月举行「制片公司所属校内试镜」被大泽事务所录取。同年10月，他在电视动画片《少女骑士物语》中首次亮相。
data.name: 山下诚一郎

data.biography: 山下誠一郎是日本的男性聲優。出身於廣島縣，畢業於Amusement Media綜合學院，所屬公司為大澤事務所。
data.name: 山下誠一郎

data.biography:
山下誠一郎（1992 年 5 月 21 日-）是日本男性聲優。

大澤事務所所屬。廣島縣出身。畢業於娛樂傳媒綜合學院聲優藝人專業。

高中畢業後，進入娛樂傳媒綜合學院。2012 年憑藉外國電影《Good Doctor - 禁斷的病歷簿》作為聲優出道，之後於 2013 年 1 月至 3 月舉行「製片公司所屬校內試鏡」被大澤事務所錄取。同年 10 月，他在電視動畫片《少女騎士物語》中首次亮相。
data.name: 山下誠一郎

data.biography:
Erki Laur (born on August 16, 1976 in Tallinn) is an Estonian actor.

He graduated in 1998 from the Estonian Academy of Music as an actor.

From 1998 to 2008, he was an actor at the Von Krahl Theater. Since 2008, he has been a freelance actor.

Erki Laur (sündinud 16. augustil 1976 Tallinnas) on eesti näitleja.

Ta on lõpetanud 1998. aastal Eesti Muusikaakadeemia Kõrgema Lavakunstikooli näitlejana (18.lend).

Aastatel 1998–2008 oli ta Von Krahli Teatri näitleja. Alates 2008. aastast on ta vabakutseline näitleja.
data.name: Erki Laur

data.biography:
Erki Laur, 19 Ağustos 1976 tarihinde Tallinn, Estonya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Estonya tiyatrosunun ve sinemasının deneyimli isimlerinden biri olan Laur, oyunculuk eğitimini Estonya Müzik ve Tiyatro Akademisi Sahne Sanatları Okulu'nda tamamlamış ve 2002 yılında mezun olmuştur. Profesyonel kariyerine ülkenin önde gelen avangart topluluklarından biri olan Von Krahl Tiyatrosu'nda başlamış, burada yer aldığı yenilikçi oyunlarla sahne disiplinini ve oyunculuk tekniğini geliştirmiştir. Daha sonra serbest oyuncu olarak çalışmaya devam etmiş ve çeşitli tiyatrolarda sahne almıştır.

Sinema ve televizyon dünyasında pek çok farklı karakteri canlandıran Laur, Estonya yapımlarının vazgeçilmez yüzlerinden biri haline gelmiştir. Kariyerinin erken dönemlerinde "Nimed marmortahvlil" (2002) gibi tarihi filmlerde ve popüler suç dizisi "Kelgukoerad"da rol almıştır. Ancak onu daha geniş bir izleyici kitlesine tanıtan proje, İlmar Raag'ın ödüllü filmi "Klass"ın olaylarını takip eden ve karakterlerin sonraki yaşamlarına odaklanan "Klass: Elu pärast" (2010) dizisi olmuştur.

Erki Laur'un uluslararası alanda dikkat çeken en prestijli işlerinden biri, 2018 yapımı "Pank" (The Bank) dizisidir. Gerçek olaylara dayanan ve 90'lı yıllarda Demir Perde'nin yıkılmasının ardından Estonya'daki bankacılık sektörünün vahşi yükselişini konu alan bu dizide, Allan karakterine hayat vermiştir. Dönemin hırslı atmosferini yansıtan bu performansı, kariyerinde önemli bir yer tutmaktadır. Sinemada ise "Kertu" (2013) ve psikolojik gerilim türündeki "Teesklejad" (Pretenders) (2016) gibi filmlerde dramatik yeteneğini sergilemiştir.

Son dönemde, Estonya'da gişe rekorları kıran ortaçağ dedektiflik serisi "Apteeker Melchior" (Melchior the Apothecary) (2022) üçlemesinde Şövalye Freising rolüyle yer alarak dönem filmlerindeki başarısını kanıtlamıştır. Erki Laur'un küresel aksiyon sineması izleyicisiyle buluştuğu yapım ise, Jalmari Helander'in yönettiği ve dünya çapında ses getiren "Sisu" (2022) filmi olmuştur. Bu filmde, efsanevi eski komando Aatami Korpi'nin peşine düşen acımasız Nazi konvoyundaki askerlerden birini canlandırmış ve filmin gerilim dolu atmosferine katkıda bulunmuştur. Laur, hem tiyatro sahnesindeki köklü geçmişi hem de ekran önündeki çok yönlülüğüyle Estonya'nın saygın aktörlerinden biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.
Gerran Lyn Howell (* 25. Februar 1991 in Wales) ist ein walisischer Schauspieler. Er hat in Young Dracula, einer Fernsehserie des BBC Wales, in 65 Folgen die Rolle des Vladimir Dracula gespielt.

Irene Wan Bik-Ha (Chinese: 溫碧霞) is a Hong Kong actress and singer and producer. Her father was an officer of the Republic of China Army. In her early years until she got married, she was known as a "sexy beauty" and was rated as loving beauty more than acting.  However, in the 1990s, her film career sputtered when she agreed to star in All of a Sudden (1996), which would be her first, and only, time appearing full-body nude in movie and the hot scenes lasted more than 4 minutes (compared to Everlasting Love (1984) where she had 5 hot scenes, but she was only half nude, and the scenes were less than 2 minutes. And a lot of the hot scenes of her later films are not as daring as All of a Sudden (1996). This move failed to ignite her career. But she later went on to star in various TVB dramas.

In 2019, she was 53 years old, but there was a hot scene with two younger actors (the male actor 14 years younger than her and the female actress 27 years younger than her), causing mixed comments. Especially her gay hot scene with a female actress younger than her made the press talk excitedly. However, her lead role in this film still helped her win the Best Actress in a Leading Role award at the 8th Silk Road International Film Festival 2020.
data.name: Irene Wan

data.biography:
温碧霞，原名温啤霞，1966年7月30日出生于香港调景岭，中国香港女演员。

1981年温碧霞被星探发掘，拍摄了第一部电影《靓妹仔》，并提名第2届香港电影金像奖最佳新人 。

1984年与刘德华主演电影《停不了的爱》而成名。

2000年10月1日，嫁给香港富商何祖光，婚后淡出娱乐圈，演出主要在中国大陆发展。

2011年凭借历史战争电影《英雄·喋血》获得第3届澳门国际电影节最佳女配角。

2012年接拍动作电影《扎职》 。

2016年主演的爱情电影《爱在深秋》上映 ；加盟何念导演的电影《这辈子有过你》 。2017年，友情出演都市职场情感剧《漂洋过海来看你》
data.name: 温碧霞

data.biography: 溫碧霞，本名溫碧玉，香港女演員，父親曾為中華民國國軍軍官。她早年以「性感美女」著稱，被評為愛美甚於演技，婚後淡出娛樂圈，間中參與演出劇集及電影，現時主要在中國大陸發展。「温碧霞」一藝名由導演黎大煒所改。
data.name: 溫碧霞

data.biography: 魏长歌是中国内地的男性配音演员。现居北京。恶人谷配音组成员，谷动风云工作室成员，2016年加入谷动风云配音工作室，代表影视作品：《继承者计划》、《春江水暖鸭先知》、《梁山伯与祝英台》游戏：《真三国无双8》郭嘉、《轩辕剑2手游》诸葛亮广播剧：《势不可挡》夏耀
data.name: 魏一凡

data.biography: 魏長歌是中國內地的男性配音演員。現居北京。惡人谷配音組成員，谷動風雲工作室成員，2016 年加入谷動風雲配音工作室，代表影視作品：《繼承者計劃》、《春江水暖鴨先知》、《梁山伯與祝英台》遊戲：《真三國無雙 8》郭嘉、《軒轅劍 2 手遊》諸葛亮廣播劇：《勢不可擋》夏耀
data.name: 魏一凡

data.biography: Esmé Creed-Miles (born 5 February 2000) is an English actress, known for starring in the Amazon Video series Hanna. Creed-Miles was born in England and attended the English boarding school Bedales. She is the daughter of actors Charlie Creed-Miles and Samantha Morton.

Bạn Có Học Đại Học Chứ?
data.overview:
Chỉ còn 100 ngày nữa là thi Đại học, một cuộc chiến tranh xảy ra sau giờ học giữa cao thủ học đường Thường Khả Ngải với dân chơi Dương Tử Hạ , hai người đánh cược , nếu như Dương Tử Hạo và Thường Khả Ngải học cùng bất kỳ trường Đại học nào thì Thường Khả Ngải sẽ phải xách cặp sách cho Dương Tử Hạo trong vòng 1 năm.

Không bất ngờ khi Thường Khả Ngải thi đỗ nguyện vọng 1, nhưng gia đình cô xảy ra biến cố, bất đắc dĩ phải từ bỏ cơ hội học Đại học, tới chợ bán quần áo với mẹ. " Bạn có học đại học chứ?" trở thành một sự tiếc nuối trong cuộc đời của cô. Còn Dương Thừa Hạo cũng vì vậy mà trở thành sinh viên khoa Quản trị kinh doanh, cuộc đời của hai người họ đều bị đảo lộn....

data.biography:
尹浩宇，本名纳塔瓦·芬克勒（泰语：ณัฐวรรธ์ ฟิงค์เลอร์，皇家转写：Nattawat Finkler），又名Patrick（Pat），泰裔德国人，出生于德国，泰国男歌手、舞者及演员，所属经纪公司为洞察娱乐，现为国际化男子音乐组合INTO1成员，与高卿尘共同担任2023中泰文化交流大使。

他于2021年2月17日参加腾讯视频偶像男团竞演养成类真人秀节目《创造营2021》，并于4月24日最终排名获得第9名，成为限定男团“INTO1”成员。
data.name: 尹浩宇

data.biography:
Patrick Nattawat Finkler is a Thai actor and singer of Thai-German descent. He was born in Germany to a German father and a Thai mother, and spent his early childhood there before relocating to Thailand in 2014. From 2014, he lived in Thailand, studying at Roi-Et Wittayalai School and Triam Udom Suksa School. In September 2023, he entered the Acting Department of Beijing Film Academy. He is fluent in Thai, German, English, and Chinese.

He began his entertainment career after winning "Go On Girl & Guy Star Search 2019" by Clean & Clear and later signed with GMMTV. His breakout role was in the series "The Gifted: Graduation" (2020). In 2021, he left the company to pursue a career in China.

In 2021, he competed in the Tencent survival show "Produce Camp 2021", ranking ninth overall. On April 24, 2021, he debuted as a member of the International boy group INTO1. The group officially disbanded in April 2023.

Since then, he has continued working as a solo artist and actor under his personal studio, Yin Haoyu Studio, established in 2024.
data.name: Patrick Finkler

data.biography:
尹浩宇，本名納塔瓦·芬克勒（泰語：ณัฐวรรธ์ ฟิงค์เลอร์，皇家轉寫：Nattawat Finkler），又名 Patrick（Pat），泰裔德國人，出生於德國，泰國男歌手、舞者及演員，所屬經紀公司為洞察娛樂，現為國際化男子音樂組合 INTO1 成員，與高卿塵共同擔任 2023 中泰文化交流大使。

他於 2021 年 2 月 17 日參加騰訊視頻偶像男團競演養成類真人秀節目《創造營 2021》，並於 4 月 24 日最終排名獲得第 9 名，成為限定男團“INTO1”成員。
data.name: 尹浩宇

data.biography: Bill "The Spaceman" Lee, the left handed pitcher for the Boston Red Sox and Montreal Expos, was one of the most colorful players in major league baseball history. With the Red Sox from 1969 through 1978, and with the Montreal Expos from 1979 until he retired in 1982, Lee won 16 or more games four times, including three straight 17 win seasons from 1973 to 1975. He was part of the Red Sox team that played what many believe is the best World Series ever, against the Cincinnatti Reds in 1975.
data.name: Bill Lee
